title: achillea odorata var. microphylla
intro: Achillea odorata var. microphylla, also known as dwarf Yarrow or Microphyllous Yarrow, is a subspecies of the Yarrow plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions. The health benefits of Achillea odorata var. microphylla include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
